_comment: Stage 3 Slice 3b — Batch 1. Smallest set that proves whether the chrome-strip behavior originates in capture.js. Source URLs match docs/admin-plugin-snapshot-recapture-plan.md and the backup admin-plugin-recapture.json. Do not delete admin-about or admin-entries; admin-entries is superseded by admin-entries-overview but kept until verification of the recapture passes.
